reviews.review_msg: The only good thing she did for our class was curve the grades at the very end. Other than that she was one of the worst profs I have ever had. I would rather be behind and take this class in 2 years than take it with her. Her lectures consist of her going over her old notes with no skeleton notes but just writing on plain graph paper

She's hard to understand, yet talks very fast. She calls you out for leaving/going on your phone, and gets mad when people call her for questions (when she gave her number out for this reason). Tests were very hard and not similar at all to the homework or practice tests she put out. For reference most people scored around 25% for the final exam.

I wouldn't take a class with her again her tests are hard but she curves nicely at the end but it makes no sense when profs make their course so difficult that most people are scoring around 25% on tests just to scale marks so enough people pass. Makes more sense to have reasonable exams instead. Terrible lectures, overall rude, terrifying exams.

Content was fine and tests were fair ish, but you must teach yourself everything. Lectures are useless and confusing. Prof cannot teach and the course feels chaotic. Extremely unorganized, TAs never know what's happening in labs, and assignments were due after the final. Very disappointing that we got such a bad prof for such a fundamental class.
Guys im sitting at a 40% pre curve. Am I cooked

Didn't show up to the first midterm, during the second midterm she legit said she knows the exam is hard but we cant ask questions. The tests wouldn't be hard if she actually drew the diagrams well. She's salty that no one attends her lectures and during the midterm she said we have to derive everything from scratch just like she did in her lecture

We have an assignment and lab due AFTER our final exam. How does that even make sense when that same content is going to be on our exam. Exams are extremely difficult so it would at least be nice to be able to know whether or not you're doing your assignment correctly before seeing that content on the final.

She is not a good professor, her lectures are just confusing. She just goes over her old notes, and she did not show up for like 2 weeks before the midterm. She did not even show up for the midterm. We are halfway through the semester, and she still has not told us when our second midterm or lab tests are. I would not recommend her class.

You learn about the internet in 427, which is some of the most interesting things I've learned. The lectures are dry, but the homework is easy to do. She is diligent in replies and is always open to discuss and offer suggestions about your project. She cares about your success and well-being; if you have a tough schedule, she will grant extensions.
Not willing to communicate with students. Difficult to develop communication harmony. Good luck with your group project.
